Description: Josh Gates explores the case of WASP pilot Gertrude ``Tommy`` Tompkins who went missing in her P-51 Mustang during World War II; Josh joins search teams using modern technology to locate Tompkins' lost aircraft.

Subject: BattleBots - Champions: Sin City: The Final Slugfest
Description: A single spot remains in the Tournament of Champions, and only one out of eight bots can survive in this single-elimination Slugfest; they dream of fighting BattleBots legends like End Game, Tantrum, and the World Champion -- SawBlaze.

Subject: Seasons on the Fly - Saltwater Heaven
Description: Traveling to Belize to pursue the myriad fish swimming in its shallow flats; an adventure off the coast of Placencia to chase bonefish, permit and snook.

Subject: The Last Captains - No Safe Waters
Description: A fire rips through the harbour in the final week of lobster season. With little left to lose, Adam bets it all on tuna.

Subject: The RVers - Touring New Brunswick
Description: Joining their first tour through the Canadian Maritime provinces, Aaron and Chris embark on an epic odyssey starting with New Brunswick ? that is, unless the ever-changing tides of Hopewell Rocks sweep them away!

Subject: TWT Report - Insulation, Adhesion and Education
Description: We spotlight on fire-resistant insulation, cutting-edge predictive maintenance and immersive, innovative learning labs.

Subject: Arabia's Best Kept Secrets with Clive Standen - Bahrain: Part Two
Description: Clive continues his journey across Bahrain, exploring its enduring traditions and the secret history of Arabian horses.

Subject: The Last Woodsmen - Crash and Burn
Description: Stretched thin and off-pace, Jared watches a loader tumble down the road; foreman Brad attempts to land his plane in choppy weather, but is forced to shelter nearby; Barge Day arrives.

Subject: Gold Rush - The Weasel
Description: Tony hunts down an insubordinate crew member; Rick gets his first gold from Lightning Creek; Kevin's parents pressure him to get his new Pyramid Cut running.

Subject: Dirty Jobs - Animal Barber
Description: Mike and the crew take on their 150th dirty job as they travel to the Spring Brook Ranch in Kalispell, Montana, and help out a yak and bison rancher.

Subject: Dirty Jobs - Egg Farm
Description: Mike Rowe learns about the life of an egg - from the chicken to the frying pan; unfortunately for him he then has to clean up the waste generated by 1.4 million chickens.

Subject: Dirty Jobs - Chicken Busters
Description: Mike spends the day chasing feral chickens to get them off the streets of Miami; then he answers a letter which asks about the familial bond often rooted within the jobs he does.

Subject: Dirty Jobs - Animal Relocator
Description: Mike travels to Mississippi, to spend a day at an old-fashioned stone ground corn mill; then he heads to Texas, to help relocate a pair of exotic Pere David's deer.

Subject: Dirty Jobs - Rock Sucker; Mountain Carver
Description: Mike sucks rocks off an industrial roof with a massive vacuum; then, he travels to the Black Hills to carve one of the largest monuments in the world: Crazy Horse.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Surthrive
Description: An independent mother and a Green Beret battle sand flies, venomous snakes and an infestation of caiman in Guyana.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Thieves in the Night
Description: One survivalist falls into a roaring fire after being depleted of energy due to a lack of food; with just days to go, the pair of survivalists makes a daring plan on how to survive, but it may cost them the challenge.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Loaded for Bear
Description: Surrounded by aggressive and territorial black bears day and night, two survivalists must compete against the apex predators for resources in the Smoky Mountains of Tennessee.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Honeymoon From Hell
Description: A married couple goes from watching the challenge from their couch in Idaho to taking it on in the perilous Philippine jungle.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Welcome to America!
Description: Two foreigners try to become the first survivalists to endure 21 days on U.S. soil; rattlesnakes, unfamiliar terrain and plummeting temperatures threaten to send them back across the pond.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - In Too Deep
Description: On the edge of the Bermuda Triangle, an Army veteran dive master and a Cajun boat captain take on relentless thunderstorms and battle dehydration as they try navigate more than 20 miles of open ocean in the ultimate test of sink or swim.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - Welcome to America!
Description: Two foreigners try to become the first survivalists to endure 21 days on U.S. soil; rattlesnakes, unfamiliar terrain and plummeting temperatures threaten to send them back across the pond.

Subject: Naked and Afraid - In Too Deep
Description: On the edge of the Bermuda Triangle, an Army veteran dive master and a Cajun boat captain take on relentless thunderstorms and battle dehydration as they try navigate more than 20 miles of open ocean in the ultimate test of sink or swim.

Subject: BattleBots - Champions: Sin City: The Golden Bolt
Description: It's the final night of the BattleBots: Champions tournament, and five Slugfest winners will go head-to-head for the the Golden Bolt; they'll fight three champions, including title-holder End Game and current World Champion SawBlaze.

Subject: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings: The Great Eight - Axing the Competition
Description: The Great 8 compete in PA for another $10,000! With the season nearing the end, everyone is trying to catch up to Kye, the points leader. Axman is in second and sees a chance to move ahead, but the pressure to win has some racers pushing too far.

Subject: Street Outlaws: No Prep Kings - Return of the Champ
Description: With five races left, the pressure is on -- and despite being so late in the season, some racers are still struggling with car problems.

Subject: Street Outlaws: Locals Only - Don't Underestimate the Underdog
Description: Locals face off in Ohio, and one racer manages to negotiate their races, getting further than anyone expected; the $5,000 prize winner goes up against the infamous Kye Kelley, but Kye is worried about how the race will go down.

Subject: Louisiana Law - Deer in the Headlights
Description: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer; agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds; health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

Subject: Louisiana Law - Road Killer
Description: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway; agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills; duck hunters are confronted for harassment; a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

Subject: Louisiana Law - Blind Rage
Description: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search-and-rescue mission for a missing fisherman; agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters, and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

Subject: Louisiana Law - Storm Surge
Description: The search is on for a missing boater who may have suffered a stroke on Corney Lake; wildlife agents deploy as a hurricane makes landfall, rescuing stranded survivors from the floodwaters and dispensing lifesaving supplies.

Subject: Louisiana Law - Fowl Play
Description: LDWF biologists undertake an explosive mission to help conserve Louisiana's wild turkeys; a suspicious deer skull points to a hunter flouting the law; more than 1,000 lbs of shrimp are at stake when a captain is caught in a major violation.

Subject: Louisiana Law - Concealed in a Cooler
Description: A bizarre discovery inside an abandoned cooler escalates a littering probe. Wildlife agents patrolling in dense fog are thrown into a dangerous encounter, and a burglary investigation uncovers an illegally taken deer.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Ghost Ship
Description: An intel tip-off has officers inspecting shipping containers for stolen cars; following a hurricane, questionable bundles begin washing ashore; agents on the night shift are tracking a suspicious vessel when it suddenly disappears from their radar.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Better Safe Than Sorry
Description: Agents look out for private boats being stolen and used by drug traffickers; officers get a tip-off that a fruit shipment from Costa Rica may have a load of narcotics within; a social media celebrity catches agents' attention for the wrong reasons.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - That's Dope
Description: Agents in Puerto Rico encounter an unidentified warship; packages washing up on the Florida coastline lead to agents investigating a failed cartel operation; agents search for a stolen vessel suspected of smuggling.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Operation Total Silence
Description: HSI agents coordinate a massive raid to take down a transnational drug trafficking gang; agents interdict an erratically moving vessel, often a sign of evasive smugglers, but it turns out that its passengers have less sinister motives.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Bahamian Rhapsody
Description: Officers race to Port Newark, where a West African car gang is getting ready to ship a stolen luxury vehicle out of the country; using the owner's GPS tracker on the car, they attempt to identify the container it's in before the ship leaves port.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Don't Be Suspicious
Description: Agents investigate a small boat crewed by three men on a well-known smuggling route, only to confirm the men have a shady past; an agent finds life jackets and clothing abandoned on the beach, evidence of a recent illegal migrant landing.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Murky Waters
Description: A routine inspection of a cargo ship uncovers a well-hidden, illicit load; weapons smugglers attempt to evade authorities; a luxury boat comes on the radar; agents locate a ship filled with people smugglers trying to make landfall.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - The Heat Is On
Description: Agents conducting a random stop-search inspection of vehicles coming off a car ferry get a hit; officers come across a shipment of 80,000 t-shirts that may all be counterfeit; agents descend into a mangrove forest to rescue stranded migrants.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Bimini Vice
Description: After a woman admits to carrying someone else's suitcase, officers find alarming documents hidden inside; intel indicates a marble shipment from China is loaded with narcotics; agents spot a fishing boat with signs it may be a smuggling vessel.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Seaweed
Description: Agents must abort a mission when an incoming tropical storm rolls in; a cruise ship passenger balks at paying U.S. duty on cigarettes; Illicit packages dumped at sea begin washing up on Florida's beaches; a Brazilian vessel intrigues agents.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Flock of Eagles
Description: When recreational anglers come across a large package floating off the Florida coast, Border Patrol agents are called to inspect; officers receive a tipoff that a shipping container full of Colombian sugar may have something else hidden inside.

Subject: Contraband: Seized at Sea - Seasick on a Sinking Ship
Description: An agent investigates a boat that made a suspicious late-night drop; officers inspect a docking ship to ensure there's no concealed load under its hull; agents track a sailboat coming from the Bahamas allegedly carrying kilos of narcotics.

Subject: Mud Madness - The Young and the Reckless
Description: AJ and Bryce's rivalry intensifies; Josh grows increasingly desperate while stirring up drama behind the scenes; AJ's personal life takes center stage when his breakup with Madi is revealed; Cole Hudson proves he's a force to be reckoned with.

Subject: Moonshiners - More Cops Less Copper
Description: Evading the law, Mark and Digger attempt to make Scotch on a Popcorn Sutton-designed pot still; Amanda joins Mark and Huck in the hills only to find all their copper stolen; Richard and Daniel deploy game cameras to protect their own valuable stills.

Subject: Deadliest Catch - Bering Sea Casino
Description: A cracked tank on the Titan Explorer leaves Jake's engines vulnerable to seawater; Keith fires another deckhand but struggles to get rid of him for good; Johnathan prescribes alternative cures as the norovirus overtakes the Time Bandit crew at sea.

Subject: Deadliest Catch - Dire Straits
Description: Sig strikes gold raiding Keith's hot spot, but when a line snarls his wheel, he must call his rival for help; a rogue wave knocks out Rick's electronics, forcing Bob to take the helm; Harley breaks in a new co-captain, only to break down at sea.

Subject: Moonshiners: Master Distiller - Absinthe's Tricky Sister
Description: Tickle digs up the history, and Mark, Digger and Tim judge, as three highly skilled distillers battle to make pastis, a high-octane liquor created in 1930s France to trick the law after the government banned its notorious sister spirit, absinthe.

Subject: Moonshiners: Master Distiller - Hard Times Shine
Description: With ingredients in short supply, Mark, Digger and Tim judge the ``hard times challenge;`` shiners Tickle, Mike and Daniel each bring their ingenuity to see who makes the best liquor with unconventional ingredients.

Subject: Moonshiners: Master Distiller - Outlaw Grudge Match
Description: Josh, Mike and Mark Rogers compete in the ultimate liquor-making rematch; judged by moonshine legends Mark, Digger and Tim.

Subject: Moonshiners: Master Distiller - Big Box Store Showdown
Description: Two moonshiners and a pro distiller face off in a big box store challenge; with just three minutes to shop the discount aisles, each must turn bulk buys into a working mash then distill it into high-proof liquor.

Subject: Moonshiners: Master Distiller - Armed Forces Face Off
Description: Tim, Mark and Digger judge the results as three U.S. military veterans who served their country overseas, battle to become the next master distiller; to nobody's surprise, Tickle takes on his duty as honorary drill sergeant a little too seriously.

Subject: Moonshiners - Pappygate Conspiracy
Description: Moonshiners Mark, Digger, Tim and Tickle delve deep into bourbon country's darkest secret; when 200 bottles of the coveted Pappy Van Winkle vanish, the theft of the world's most expensive bourbon is just the tip of a staggering criminal conspiracy.

Subject: Moonshiners - Crime and Shine: Crimes Against Popcorn Sutton
Description: For outlaw Popcorn Sutton, freedom means answering to a higher law, making tax-free liquor as his forefathers did; now that Popcorn's in the government's crosshairs, no moonshiner in history has ever felt more persecuted by the law.

Subject: Moonshiners - Crime and Shine: The Raid That Changed Moonshine
Description: Moonshiners Henry Law, Tickle and Tim revisit Operation Lightning Strike, a massive federal anti-moonshine action; targeting Franklin County, Virginia, the so-called ``Moonshine Capital of the World.``

Subject: Moonshiners - Smokin' Barrels
Description: Mark and Digger shop for new oak barrels; after spotting an unmarked vehicle surveilling their barrel house, the duo must devise an alternative way to sell their bourbon.

Subject: Moonshiners - Floodwater Runs Deep
Description: After Hurricane Helene flooded Appalachia, Mike and Jerry find their new submarine still washed away; Tickle tries to persuade accident-prone Josh not to return to racing; Richard gets a special order, but tracking the fruit proves a thorny problem.

Subject: Moonshiners - Strange Brew
Description: After discovering a strange barrel of mash, Mark and Digger scramble to reproduce a game-changing liquor run.

Subject: Moonshiners - Spousal Privilege
Description: Fearing that the law targets them, Mark and Digger enlist a new team member who can't testify to do the dirty work; Tickle and the Laws get their hands on a field of free sorghum seeds, but must rely on an unproven recipe to turn them into shine.

Subject: Moonshiners - Poaching Pumpkins
Description: Desperate to save his low-cost sorghum seed liquor, Tickle poaches pumpkins from his wife's patch; when a hippie commune requests a large quantity of hard kombucha, Mike and Jerry find they still have a lot to learn about fermentation.

Subject: Moonshiners - Persons of Interest
Description: Realizing that they may be targets of a police stakeout, Mark and Digger prepare their outlaw distilling teams for the worst; Howard drinks the last bottle of decades-old rye elixir, forcing Tim to recreate his dad's unwritten recipe.

Subject: Moonshiners - Imposter Syndrome
Description: Desperate to discover who is surveilling them, Mark and Digger set a trap; Tim and Howard attempt a new path to recreating the family's high-proof elixir recipe; when Big Chuk arrives in Franklin County unexpectedly, Tickle and Henry have concerns.

Subject: Moonshiners - Resisting Arrest
Description: Mark and Digger scramble to clear evidence of outlaw activity, only to discover the law is one step ahead; Mike and Jerry build a column still that runs two proofs at once; in his final run, Kenny lends a hand to a legend in need.

Description: Fed up with canned food and hiding in the woods, Josh gets into trouble with Kenny Law; Popcorn's son proves as unpredictable as his father; Tim and Howard rediscover a lost recipe for log still whiskey invented by a Kentucky teenager in 1836.

Description: When the Time Bandit loses power with a storm at its tail, Johnathan deploys a camera probe to find what's snarling his propeller; Keith sets a decoy string to lure Sig away from good fishing, but risks his own secret plan by trusting the wrong ally.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Pique
Description: The murder of a software company employee leads Benson and Stabler to a fired co-worker who may have a horrifying motive for the slaying.

Subject: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit - Paranoia
Description: The rape of a veteran police officer is first linked to her ex-husband's gambling debts, and then to her fellow officers.

Subject: Violent Night (2022)
Description: An elite team of mercenaries breaks into a family compound on Christmas Eve, taking everyone hostage inside. However, they aren't prepared for a surprise combatant: Santa Claus is on the grounds, and he's about to show why this Nick is no saint.

Subject: Midsommar (2019)
Description: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

Subject: Marshall (2017)
Description: Young Thurgood Marshall faces one of his greatest challenges while working as a lawyer for the NAACP. He teams up with lawyer Sam Friedman to defend Joseph Spell, a Black chauffeur whose employer accuses him of sexual assault and attempted murder.

Subject: The Bride of Frankenstein (1935)
Description: Baron Frankenstein (Colin Clive) creates a hissing, frizzy-haired female (Elsa Lanchester) for his other monster (Boris Karloff).

Subject: Dim Sum Funeral (2008)
Description: The grown children of an overbearing Chinese matriarch reluctantly gather to take part in seven days' worth of traditional funeral rites.

Subject: Spaceship Earth (2020)
Description: In 1991 eight visionaries embark on a two-year experiment to quarantine themselves inside Biosphere 2 -- a self-engineered replica of Earth's ecosystem.

Subject: Knox Goes Away (2023)
Description: Diagnosed with a rapidly evolving form of dementia, a contract killer gets the chance to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged son.

Subject: Repo Men (2010)
Description: Set in the future when artificial organs can be bought on credit, a man struggles to make the payments on a heart he has purchased. He must go on the run before the heart is repossessed.

Subject: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets (2017)
Description: In the 28th century, two special operatives (Dane DeHaan, Cara Delevingne) race against time to save the diverse city of Alpha from a dark force that also jeopardizes the future of the universe.

Subject: Dredd (2012)
Description: In a violent, futuristic metropolis, a law-enforcement officer (Karl Urban) and his rookie trainee (Olivia Thirlby) become caught up in a high-stakes conflict with a vicious prostitute-turned-drug lord (Lena Headey).

Subject: Chronicle (2012)
Description: Three high-school friends make a discovery that gives them incredible superpowers, but their lives spin out of control when their darker sides begin to emerge.

Subject: The Invitation (2022)
Description: Invited by her long-lost family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, a woman is thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.

Subject: A Nightmare on Elm Street (2010)
Description: Teens (Rooney Mara, Kyle Gallner) struggle to stay awake when a razor-gloved killer (Jackie Earle Haley) invades their dreams.

Subject: Trap (2024)
Description: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

Description: After a serious car accident, a man (Liam Neeson) awakes to find that his wife does not recognize him, that another man has assumed his identity, and that assassins are hunting him.

Description: Incarcerated as a very young man, Michael Peterson (Tom Hardy) morphs into a personality called Charles Bronson and becomes England's most-violent prisoner.

Subject: Accidentally Brave (2023)
Description: Following an actress whose life is upended when she discovers her husband's dark secret.

Subject: Beyond the Black Rainbow (2011)
Description: A heavily sedated woman (Eva Allan) with ESP tries to escape from the secluded commune where she's been held captive.

Description: A SWAT team ace (Keanu Reeves) must keep the speed of a Santa Monica bus above 50 mph, or a madman's (Dennis Hopper) bomb will explode.

Description: To save his kidnapped wife, a former race-car driver (Ethan Hawke) must follow the instructions of a man (Jon Voight) who is watching his every move through a hidden camera.

Description: A thief (Leonardo DiCaprio) who enters people's dreams and steals their secrets gets a shot at redemption when he is given the dangerous task of planting an idea in someone's subconscious.

Description: Dr. John Thackery ascends to the role of chief surgeon and is pressured by hospital benefactors to hire a black assistant chief, Algernon Edwards.

Description: Thackery is asked to perform reconstructive surgery on a former flame; Algernon experiences a very frustrating day at work.

Subject: The Knick - Where's the Dignity?
Description: Algernon angers Eleanor when he forces Thackery's hand during surgery; a recovering Abigail regrets her past choices involving Thackery; Cleary and Sister Harriet strike a deal.

Description: Barrow seeks to pay down a debt by treating one of Collier's wounded men; Barrow tries to convince Capt. Robertson to buy a new Edison invention; Edwards tries to improve on a hernia surgery.

Description: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. While trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs fight more personal and complex battles.

Subject: Magic Mike's Last Dance (2023)
Description: Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike Lane heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

Subject: Showgirls (1995)
Description: A dancer (Elizabeth Berkley) becomes understudy in a Las Vegas show, sleeps with the boss (Kyle MacLachlan) and pushes the star (Gina Gershon) down a flight of stairs.

Description: Walter Keane (Christoph Waltz) achieves worldwide fame for pop-art portraits of saucer-eyed waifs, but no one knows that it's his wife, Margaret (Amy Adams), who's the real genius behind the paintbrush.

Description: Supercomputer HAL 9000 guides astronauts (Keir Dullea, Gary Lockwood, William Sylvester) on a trip to find the origins of humans.

Subject: The Mummy (2017)
Description: An ancient Egyptian princess is awakened from her crypt beneath the desert, bringing with her malevolence grown over millennia, and terrors that defy human comprehension.

Subject: My Cousin Rachel (2017)
Description: Philip is a young Englishman who falls under the spell of a beautiful but manipulative woman named Rachel. As his obsession for her grows, she hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

Subject: Tuesday (2023)
Description: A mother and her daughter must confront Death when it arrives in the form of an astonishing talking bird.

Description: Lee, a solitary American in Mexico City, falls for a beautiful, elusive former soldier. Journeying together into the jungle, Lee sees, for the first time, the possibility of an intimate and infinite love.

Description: A fast-talking literary agent (Eddie Murphy) must learn how to live without speech upon discovering that he has only a thousand words left to say before he dies.

Description: The possibility of a new romance leads a self-help guru (Aaron Eckhart) to the realization that he has never truly confronted his wife's death.

Description: Socially awkward Charlie is a wallflower watching from the sidelines, until a pair of charismatic seniors take him under their wing.

Two planes almost collide after a flash of light paralyzes an air traffic controller for a few seconds. Suspended from his job, he must now figure out why he's experiencing a repetition of sounds and events in his life at the same time every day.

Description: Animals fight to survive extremes, from tundra to deserts, mountain summits to deep underground.

Subject: Jack Frost (1998)
Description: A man (Michael Keaton) who died on Christmas Eve returns to his wife (Kelly Preston) and son one year later in the form of a snowman.

Subject: Fred Claus (2007)
Description: The yuletide season brings headaches for Santa Claus, who bails his ne'er-do-well brother Fred out of trouble and puts him to work in his factory.

Subject: The Holiday (2006)
Description: Two women, one from America and one from Britain, swap homes at Christmastime after bad breakups with their boyfriends. Each woman finds romance with a local man but realizes that the imminent return home may end the relationship.

Subject: Four Christmases (2008)
Description: When their plans for a holiday getaway fall apart, a couple (Vince Vaughn, Reese Witherspoon) must spend Christmas Day trudging to a quartet of family get-togethers.

Subject: Big (1988)
Description: At a carnival, young Josh Baskin wishes he was big, only to wake up the next morning and discover his wish came true. But the more Josh experiences life as an adult, the more he longs for the simple joys of childhood.

Subject: Liar Liar (1997)
Description: A boy's birthday wish comes true that his neglectful father, a fast-talking lawyer, cannot tell a lie for 24 hours.

Subject: Click (2006)
Description: An overworked architect meets an eccentric inventor who gives him a universal remote that allows him to control the world around him.

Subject: Law & Order - Under God
Description: A vigilante priest kills a notorious drug dealer in the name of God; Briscoe is reminded of his daughter's death at the hands of a trafficker.

Subject: Law & Order - Absentia
Description: Two seemingly unrelated murders, stolen jewels and a case of mistaken identity lead to a defendant being tried for a crime without being present at the trial. Mandy Patinkin and Andrew McCarthy guest star.

Subject: Law & Order - Star Crossed
Description: When a car salesman is found bludgeoned to death, Detectives Briscoe and Green search for his last customer.

Subject: Law & Order - Bitch
Description: A cosmetics tycoon (Lucie Arnaz) is involved in controversial stock transactions, scandalous affairs and hormone-replacement therapy.

Subject: Law & Order - Suicide Box
Description: A media-savvy attorney (Gregory Hines) defends a black teenager accused of shooting an off-duty police officer.

Subject: Seven Worlds, One Planet - Africa
Description: Africa is home to the greatest collection of wildlife on Earth, with a vast tropical rainforest full of life at its heart, but animals face big challenges in this land of plenty.

Subject: Love the Coopers (2015)
Description: When four generations of the Cooper clan come together for their annual Christmas Eve celebration, a series of unexpected visitors and unlikely events turn the night upside down.

Subject: The Holiday (2006)
Description: Two women, one from America and one from Britain, swap homes at Christmastime after bad breakups with their boyfriends. Each woman finds romance with a local man but realizes that the imminent return home may end the relationship.

Description: Tech-school prodigies (Val Kilmer, Gabe Jarret) learn their laser project is actually a death beam funded by the military.

Description: A Los Angeles sports agent (Tom Cruise) finds love with a pretty accountant (Renee Zellweger) after an attack of conscience costs him his job and fiancee.

Subject: Law & Order - Genius
Description: Detectives investigating a cabdriver's death discover his last fare was a gifted writer with a violent streak.

Subject: Law & Order - Maritime
Description: After a woman's body turns up in the East River, the detectives discover she recently had attended a professional football player's birthday party.

Subject: Law & Order - Seer
Description: The lead suspect in the murder of a Manhattan executive claims his knowledge of the crime came from a psychic vision.

Subject: Law & Order - Kid Pro Quo
Description: Investigators identify multiple suspects in the murder of the admissions director at an ultra-elite private school, including its headmaster (guest star Roger Rees).

Subject: Law & Order - House Calls
Description: The corpse of a Russian model shows many old injuries, convincing the detectives that she had been the victim of abuse.

Subject: Law & Order - Sheltered
Description: A sniper shoots four people at random in Manhattan and causes a citywide panic; Jack and Serena uncover a shocking truth behind the shootings.

Subject: Law & Order - Couples
Description: The detectives follow a string of mysterious homicides; a woman runs over her unfaithful husband; a murdered woman has an uncertain relationship to her brothers.

Subject: The Three Stooges - I'm a Monkey's Uncle
Description: The caveman boys meet cavewomen.

Subject: The Three Stooges - Mummy's Dummies
Description: The boys run a used chariot lot in Egypt.

Subject: Bones - The Boy With the Answer
Description: Everyone at the Jeffersonian tries to uncover forensic evidence to help elicit a conviction in the trial of the Gravedigger.

Subject: Bones - The Beginning in the End
Description: The remains of a hoarder are discovered; Angela's father (Billy Gibbons) visits; Booth and Brennan are each confronted with unique opportunities.

Subject: Bones - The Mastodon in the Room
Description: The team helps Cam solve the case of an unidentified boy; after making personal discoveries, the members of the team realize they belong in Washington, D.C.

Subject: Bones - The Couple in the Cave
Description: The remains of a couple are found in a cave; Brennan re-evaluates her relationship with Booth when his girlfriend makes a surprise visit.

Subject: Bones - The Maggots in the Meathead
Description: Brennan and Booth head to the Jersey Shore when decomposed remains are discovered; the team becomes fond of Booth's girlfriend; Angela tries to keep a secret.

Subject: Bones - The Body and the Bounty
Description: When a skull and decomposing hands are found in a dumpster, the team searches for the rest of the victim's remains; Brennan agrees to shoot an episode of a children's show with professor Bunsen, ``The Science Dude`` Jude (David Alan Grier).

Subject: A Bronx Tale (1993)
Description: The son (Lillo Brancato) of an honest bus driver (Robert De Niro) looks up to a local mob boss (Chazz Palminteri) amid racial tension in 1960s New York.

Subject: True Grit (2010)
Description: A teenage girl enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her father's killer (Josh Brolin).

Subject: Unforgiven (1992)
Description: An old gunslinger (Clint Eastwood), his ex-partner (Morgan Freeman) and a quick-draw kid go bounty hunting in a town called Big Whiskey.

Subject: Point Break (1991)
Description: An FBI agent (Keanu Reeves) turns California surfer to nab bank robbers who wear rubber masks of four ex-presidents.

Subject: Law & Order - Smoke
Description: A comic's infant son dies after being dropped from a high-rise window, leading detectives to a dark secret.

Subject: Law & Order - Bodies
Description: The detectives stumble upon a serial killer while investigating the rape and murder of a teenage girl.

Subject: Law & Order - Bounty
Description: A bounty hunter turns up dead while trailing a fugitive rapist and bookstore heir.

Subject: Law & Order - Patient Zero
Description: A carjacking involving SARS forces detectives to search for the initial patient infected to prevent an outbreak.

Subject: Law & Order - Shrunk
Description: Detectives link the murder of an actress to a member of her therapy group, then focus their attention on a Tony-winning songwriter.

Subject: Law & Order - Blaze
Description: Detectives investigate a fire that ripped through a 300-plus audience at a rock concert, killing 23 fans.

Subject: Law & Order - Identity
Description: An unemployed executive deposits $400,000 in his savings account before being gunned down in his upscale brownstone.

Subject: Law & Order - Floater
Description: The detectives attempt to identify a body that was found floating in the Hudson River; after the victim is identified, her husband becomes the prime suspect.

Subject: Law & Order - Embedded
Description: A war correspondent who reputedly endangered U.S. troops in Iraq gets shot in the back with a military-issue handgun.

Subject: The Wild Sides - Flood and Foes
Description: The landscape transforms as the rains finally fall, bringing in various changes for the wildlife.

Description: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy), competes against nobles in 14th-century France.

Description: The Sherwood Forest archer (Cary Elwes) leads his melting pot of outlaws against Prince John (Richard Lewis) and the Sheriff of Rottingham (Roger Rees).

Subject: Criminal Minds - Rabid
Description: Three bodies bitten by humans and animals are found in a shallow grave; Garcia and Reid hide their preparation for a company fitness test from Morgan.

Subject: Criminal Minds - The Edge of Winter
Description: Morgan's visit with a survivor of unusual stabbings in upstate New York leads to more questions about the case.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Blood Relations
Description: The discovery of two murder victims in West Virginia uncovers a long-simmering feud between two families.

Subject: Criminal Minds - What Happens in Mecklinburg ...
Description: The team searches for a commonality when a series of target abductions take place; Savannah is frustrated with Morgan's traveling.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Fatal
Description: When people are killed by arsenic poisoning and handwritten death threats are found, the team pursues a suspect fascinated by Greek mythology; Hotch is worried about participating in a Career Day at Jack's school.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Angels
Description: When prostitutes are murdered in Texas, their deaths seem to have religious overtones; members of the team are put at risk throughout the course of the investigation.

Subject: Criminal Minds - Demons
Description: The investigation in Texas reveals a deep web of corruption; Garcia must save a friend.

Subject: Hidden Habitats - Great Barrier Reef
Description: The Great Barrier Reef exists in nutrient-poor waters, in spite of its immense size.

Subject: South Pacific - Ocean of Islands
Description: A closer look into the blue will reveal a scattering of islands, from the Tropics to the sub-Antartic waters of the Southern Ocean.

Subject: South Pacific - Castaways
Description: The ultimate castaways, from saltwater crocodiles and giant eels to crested iguanas, overcome great odds to reach islands thousands of miles apart.

Subject: Seven Worlds, One Planet - North America
Description: More than any other continent, North America is defined by extreme weather and seasonal change; for animals that live here this poses great challenges, but for those with a pioneering spirit it can also offer great rewards.

Description: When Captain James Hook kidnaps his children, an adult Peter Pan must return to Neverland and reclaim his youthful spirit in order to challenge his old enemy.

Subject: The Princess Bride (1987)
Description: A storybook stableboy turns pirate (Cary Elwes) and rescues his beloved (Robin Wright), who is about to marry a dreadful prince.

Subject: The Graham Norton Show
Description: Timothée Chalamet, Emma Thompson, Rowan Atkinson, JADE.

Subject: NCIS - Squall
Description: The team investigates a murder on a U.S. Navy ship; tension rises when McGee learns that his estranged father is one of the suspects.

Subject: NCIS - Chasing Ghosts
Description: A Navy reservist asks the team for help when she realizes her husband is missing and her living room is covered in blood; Tony thinks Ziva is planning to avenge her father's death.

Subject: NCIS - Berlin
Description: As the team investigates a Mossad officer's murder in Virginia, Tony and Ziva pursue her father's killer.

Subject: NCIS - Revenge
Description: Ignoring orders from Homeland Security, the team searches for Bodnar in order to avenge the murders of Eli David and Jackie Vance.

Subject: NCIS - Double Blind
Description: An investigator (Colin Hanks) from the Department of Defense scrutinizes the team's response to the Bodnar case; the team must determine whether a petty officer is suffering from paranoia when he claims he is being followed.

Subject: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet - To the Ends of the Earth
Description: David Attenborough travels from the Arctic to the Antarctic to discover magical new ice worlds inhabited by the most extraordinary animal survivors on earth.

Subject: Hidden Habitats - Canada's Coastal Forests
Description: The Coastal Forest in Canada is home to the largest aggregations of North American predators.

Subject: Earth's Great Seasons - Autumn
Description: With winter fast approaching, life has to get ready and that means feeding up while you can, fighting for the last chance to breed and rushing to grow up before the cold returns.

Subject: Earth's Great Seasons - Winter
Description: Andrew Scott narrates a special programme about winter and explores how animals and plants rise to the challenges it brings.

Subject: Nestor, the Long-Eared Christmas Donkey
Description: Guided by his guardian cherub, an orphan donkey realizes his destiny on the road to Bethlehem.

Subject: The First Christmas: The Story of the First Christmas Snow
Description: A nun in France cares for a boy who was blinded by a lightning bolt.

Subject: The Life & Adventures of Santa Claus (2000)
Description: Fairies adopt an orphaned human baby, who grows up to become Jolly Old St. Nicholas. Animated.

Subject: Nanny McPhee Returns (2010)
Description: Magical Nanny McPhee (Emma Thompson) helps a harried mother (Maggie Gyllenhaal) who is trying to care for five children and tend to the family farm while her husband is away at war.

Subject: Caddyshack (1980)
Description: Oddballs (Chevy Chase, Rodney Dangerfield, Bill Murray) and gophers undermine a country-club caddy out to win a college scholarship.

Subject: National Lampoon's European Vacation (1985)
Description: After winning a European vacation on a game show, Clark Griswold convinces his reluctant family to accompany him. His wife, Ellen, is excited, but daughter Audrey is reluctant to leave her boyfriend behind.

Subject: College Basketball - Saint Joseph's at Syracuse
Description: Saint Joseph's plays Syracuse in New York. The programs were scheduled to meet at the Players Era Championship in Las Vegas in November, but the Hawks left the field due to a coaching change. The Orange are 4-0 at the JMA Wireless Dome this season.

Description: The No. 17 Cavaliers (10-2) and Blue Devils (7-5) compete for the ACC championship. Virginia defeated Duke 34-17 in November. Cavaliers senior J'Mari Taylor has rushed for 14 touchdowns. Blue Devils sophomore Darian Mensah boasts 28 touchdown passes.

Subject: College Basketball - Evansville at Notre Dame
Description: The Purple Aces (4-6) take a shot at the Fighting Irish (8-3) in South Bend, Ind. Notre Dame is 6-4 versus Evansville after scoring a 58-49 decision in 2012, their only meeting since 1992. The Irish carry a three-game winning run into this contest.

Subject: College Basketball - UC Davis at Oregon

Subject: College Basketball - Southern Utah at Washington

Description: The Donk Toss World Championships is a glorious backyard sport that blends skill, chaos, and comedy. Players toss an inflatable donkey and score points by landing it in funny positions -- on its feet, ears-down, snout-first, or even upside down.

Subject: NTPA Unlimited Pulling Tractors
Description: NTPA Grand National Unlimited Pulling Tractors from the Wisconsin Dairyland Super Nationals in Tomah, Wis., on June 28, 2025. Unlimited Pulling Tractors are the most powerful motorsports vehicles on the planet!

Subject: US Quadball Invitational
Description: Top quadball, formerly known as quidditch, players from around the U.S. compete.

Subject: Disc Golf Pro Tour - 2022 Tour Championship
Description: The best disc golfers in the world compete for the highest purse of all time in this recap of the Disc Golf Pro Tour Championship.

Subject: Extreme Axe & Knife Games
Description: Extreme axe and knife action from the WATL Commissioner's Cup.

Subject: Ultimate Ninja World Series Finals
Description: The Ultimate Ninja World Series Finals is a culmination of the best of the best athletes in the world at ninja obstacles. It is the largest ninja obstacle competition in the world and these pros are vying for pride and prize money.

Subject: Buoy Cup
Description: Semifinal match of the Buoy Cup brings together battle-tested vets Crown Jules and Ding Nasty versus upstarts Young Slug and Red October at the legendary Windjammer.

Subject: WJF 20: The Ultimate Overall Championship
Description: The world's elite jugglers compete in the highest level sport juggling competition in history.

Subject: Pop-A-Shot 2024 National Championship
Description: For the first time in a quarter century, Pop-A-Shot will crown a national champion. The Pop-A-Shot 2024 National Championship will test the country's best Pop-A-Shot players in a head-to-head, tournament-style competition.

Subject: Blade Masters: Axe & Knife Throwing

Description: International darts competition.

Description: $100,000 in prize money is up for grabs as three of the nation's top players battle for the Putt-Putt Golf National Championship.

Subject: USA Dodgeball All-Star Showcase
Description: The USA Dodgeball All-Star Showcase pits seasoned All-Star players from across the country against each other in a no-holds-barred competition for fame, glory, and bragging rights.

Description: Carriers compete to secure a spot on the historic Mailboat Team, jumping from boat to dock and back again while in motion. It's part timing, part chaos,and a century-old tradition that defines summer. Don't fall in-or do, but don't expect sympathy.

Subject: 2025 National Bubble Gum Blowing Championship
Description: Finalists chew. They blow. They pray it doesn't pop too soon. The biggest unburst bubble wins. One gum blower will be crowned the 2025 Champion. The rest go home sticky and defeated.

Subject: FlingGolf: LFC-5 Longest FlingShot Championship
Description: With FlingSticks and golf balls, top World League FlingGolf Pros battle to outdistance each other and take home the LFC Belt.

Description: Wacky engineers and fearless pilots build human-powered flying machines to take leaps of faith into the Ohio River.

Subject: College Basketball - DePaul at Wichita State
Description: The Shockers (6-4) take on the visiting Blue Demons (7-3). DePaul earned a 91-72 home victory last season in its first meeting with Wichita State since 2013. The Demons won five of their last six outings, while the Shockers seek a third straight win.

Subject: College Basketball - Cincinnati vs. Georgia
Description: The Bearcats (6-3) face the Bulldogs (8-1) in a Holiday Hoopsgiving tilt in Atlanta. Cincinnati bested Georgia 73-68 in their latest meeting Nov. 13, 2021. UGA averaged 115 points over its last two outings, and its lone 2025-26 loss came in overtime.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Oklahoma vs. Oklahoma State
Description: The No. 23 Cowgirls battle the No. 9 Sooners in Oklahoma City. Oklahoma has won six straight over Oklahoma State, which comes off a 133-46 obliteration of Mississippi Valley State that set school records for most points and largest margin of victory.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Louisiana Tech vs. LSU
Description: The No. 5 Tigers face the Lady Techsters in the Compete 4 Cause Classic. LSU has won 10 straight meetings. Tigers coach Kim Mulkey led the Lady Techsters to two national titles as a player before beginning her coaching career with Louisiana Tech.

Subject: College Basketball - Ohio State vs. West Virginia
Description: The Mountaineers (8-3) clash again with the Buckeyes (7-2) in the Cleveland Hoops Showdown from Rocket Arena. Ohio State squeaked out a 78-75 overtime decision against West Virginia at the home of the NBA's Cavaliers on Dec. 30, 2023.

Subject: College Basketball - Mississippi State vs. Utah
Description: The Bulldogs (4-5) trek to the Delta Center in Salt Lake City to challenge the Utes (7-3). This game features two of the nation's scoring leaders in Utah guard Terrence Brown (21.6 points per game) and Mississippi State guard Josh Hubbard (21.2 ppg).

Subject: Heisman Trophy Ceremony

Subject: College Football - Cricket Celebration Bowl: South Carolina State vs. Prairie View A&M
Description: The Panthers (10-3) face the Bulldogs (9-3) in the Celebration Bowl from Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta. Prairie View A&M claimed its first Southwestern Athletic Conference championship since 2009 with a 23-21 victory at Jackson State on Dec. 6.

Subject: College Football - FCS Division I Championship: South Dakota at Montana
Description: The No. 3 Grizzlies (12-1) go for a South Dakota sweep as they host the No. 11 Coyotes (10-4) in an FCS quarterfinal. Montana amassed 552 yards of offense in a 50-29 second-round victory over South Dakota State. South Dakota won at Mercer 47-0.

Subject: Heisman Trophy Ceremony

Description: A spot in the NCAA Women's Volleyball Final Four is on the line in this regional final.

Subject: College Basketball - Indiana at Kentucky
Description: The Wildcats (6-4) defend Rupp Arena from the Hoosiers (8-2). This is the first meeting between the schools since the 2016 NCAA Tournament's second round, when Indiana eliminated Kentucky 73-67. Both teams ended two-game slides with Dec. 9 triumphs.

Subject: 30 for 30 - One and Not Done
Description: An intimate look at University of Kentucky men's basketball coach John Calipari, one of the most compelling and controversial figures in sports. Featuring never-before-seen footage as he tries to capture his second national title.

Subject: 30 for 30 - Survive and Advance
Description: North Carolina State, coached by Jim Valvano, was a huge underdog in the 1983 NCAA Final vs. top-ranked Houston - resulting in one of the greatest college basketball upsets ever.

Subject: TrueSouth - Shreveport
Description: Herby K's is a 1936 vintage beer garden and fry house. Lucky Palace serves wol-fried-t-bones and pork egg foo young. Both of these restaurants are survivors, like Shreveport itself.

Subject: TrueSouth - Nashville
Description: Sands, the soul food café, cooks oxtails and cabbage and ropy okra; Arnold's Country Kitchen, Kahlil Arnold dishes created corn, hashed turnip greens, and fried green tomatoes; the differences between black and white cooking come into focus.

Subject: Men's College Soccer - NCAA Tournament, Championship: Teams TBA
Description: From WakeMed Soccer Park in Cary, N.C.

Subject: TrueSouth - New Orleans
Description: If you're a local of New Orleans, you might recognize West African borrowings in music and food but Italian New Orleans has been largely forgotten.

Subject: TrueSouth - Beaumont
Description: This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps and the oppressiveness of brisket and how popular narratives have obscured two Gulf Coast dishes that manage to hang on.

Subject: TrueSouth - Hodgenville
Description: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. In these Southern towns, onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

Subject: TrueSouth - Memphis
Description: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful, Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb, and Ms. Girlee's.

Subject: Men's College Soccer - NCAA Tournament, Championship: Teams TBA

Subject: 30 for 30 - The Last Days of Knight
Description: Examining Bob Knight's fall from grace at Indiana University.

Subject: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle

Subject: 30 for 30 - I Hate Christian Laettner
Description: Director Rory Karpf, through interviews with former players and rivals as well as Laettner himself, explores why this former Duke star was, and still is, so disliked.

Subject: 30 for 30 - Playing for the Mob
Description: Mobster Henry Hill once helped to orchestrate the fixing of Boston College basketball games. Narrated by Ray Liotta, who portrayed Hill in the movie ``Goodfellas.``

Subject: 30 for 30 - Phi Slama Jama
Description: The University of Houston's high-flying basketball team, known as ``Phi Slama Jama,`` made three straight trips to the Final Four and transformed the game forever.

Subject: ESPN Films - The Class That Saved Coach K
Description: The story of Duke basketball head coach Mike Krzyzewski and his 1982 recruiting class that, over four years, would overcome a bumpy start to change the narrative - setting its coach on a historic course.

Subject: IndyCar Racing - The Thermal Club Indycar Grand Prix

Subject: IndyCar Racing - Sonsio Grand Prix

Subject: The 109th Running of the Indianapolis 500
Description: The IndyCar Series runs its crown jewel event, the 109th Indianapolis 500. Despite three series titles and 15 wins, including four this year, Álex Palou looks to kiss the bricks for the first time. Josef Newgarden is the two-time defending champion.

Description: Hosts Patrick Claybon, Cynthia Frelund, Gregg Rosenthal provide analysis and predictions, also receive insight from reporters around the country and in-depth statistical analysis.

Subject: NFL Football - Los Angeles Rams at Seattle Seahawks
Description: NFC West contenders battle in the Emerald City as the Seahawks host the Rams. Los Angeles made it four wins in its last five tries versus Seattle in Week 11, when Jason Myers could not convert a 61-yard field goal as time expired in a 21-19 decision.

Subject: The Insiders
Description: NFL media insiders Ian Rapoport, Mike Garafolo and Tom Pelissero deliver the inside scoop and storylines of the week.

Subject: College Football - LSU at Ole Miss
Description: A clash at the top of the SEC pits the No. 13 Rebels (4-0, 2-0) against the No. 4 Tigers (4-0, 1-0). LSU claimed seven of the past nine meetings, but dropped its last two visits to Oxford, Miss., including a 55-49 Ole Miss win in a 2023 barn burner.

Subject: SEC Now
Description: News and information show hosted by Peter Burns, Dari Nowkhah or Alyssa Lang, joined by various network analysts, discussing all the SEC news of the day.

Subject: College Football - Missouri at Vanderbilt
Description: A heavyweight SEC tilt pits No. 10 Vanderbilt against No. 15 Missouri. The Tigers have won five straight meetings after outlasting the Commodores in a double-overtime thriller last year. This is the first double-ranked matchup between the schools.

Subject: College Football - Oklahoma at Alabama
Description: The No. 11 Sooners (7-2, 3-2 SEC) visit the No. 4 Crimson Tide (8-1, 6-0) in this marquee matchup. Alabama has won eight straight after burying LSU, 20-9 out of its bye Nov. 8. Oklahoma shocked then-No. 14 Tennessee 33-27 before its week off Nov. 1.

Subject: SEC Now
Description: News and information show hosted by Peter Burns, Dari Nowkhah or Alyssa Lang, joined by various network analysts, discussing all the SEC news of the day.

Subject: College Basketball - UT-Chattanooga vs. Auburn
Description: The No. 21 Tigers (7-3) battle the Mocs (5-5) at Atlanta's State Farm Arena for Holiday Hoopsgiving. Chattanooga, which lost 101-66 to Auburn two seasons ago, looks to claim its first win over an SEC opponent since topping Tennessee on Nov. 11, 2016.

Subject: College Basketball - Central Arkansas at Vanderbilt
Description: The Bears (4-6) cross the state line as they step up to the No. 15 Commodores (9-0). Tyler Tanner scored 26 points in Vanderbilt's most recent win, 88-69 over SMU on Dec. 3. Central Arkansas fell 75-71 to Vanderbilt in Tennessee two seasons ago.

Subject: College Basketball - SMU vs. LSU
Description: The Tigers (8-1) tackle the Mustangs (9-1) at the Compete 4 Cause Classic in New Orleans. LSU took its first loss of the season on Dec. 7 when it was smashed 82-58 by then-No. 19 Texas Tech. SMU defeated LSU 74-64 at this event last season in Texas.

Subject: Women's College Basketball - Jackson State at Alabama
Description: The Crimson Tide (10-0) roll into this matchup with the Lady Tigers (2-6). Jessica Timmons and Essence Cody both average more than 15 points per game for undefeated Alabama. The Tide lead the all-time series 4-0 after a 40-point win in 2009.
